title: Winter Support for Newcomer Families
summary: Warm coats, boots, and heating help for refugee and newcomer families through the Finnish winter.

title: Orphan & Youth Sponsorship — Finland
summary: Education, meals, and mentoring for children in the community for a full school year.

title: Ramadan Food Parcels — Tampere
summary: Staple food boxes delivered to families in need before and during Ramadan.

title: Espoo Islamic Centre Expansion
summary: Help expand the prayer hall and youth space serving a growing congregation.
